name: Turnover Cost Calculator
description: Calculates total cost of employee turnover based on direct and indirect costs, using industrial engineering standards (ISO 30400, Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Number of Employees
inputs.businessContext: Total headcount at the start of the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total headcount at the start of the period.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Effectif total au début de la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Plantilla total al inicio del período.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الموظفين في بداية الفترة.

inputs.label: Annual Turnover Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of employees leaving per year (voluntary + involuntary).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of employees leaving per year (voluntary + involuntary).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Mitarbeiter, die pro Jahr ausscheiden (freiwillig + unfreiwillig).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'employés quittant l'entreprise par an (volontaire + involontaire).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de empleados que se van por año (voluntario + involuntario).
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية للموظفين الذين يغادرون سنويًا (طوعي + غير طوعي).

inputs.label: Average Annual Salary per Employee
inputs.businessContext: Average total compensation (base + benefits) per employee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average total compensation (base + benefits) per employee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışan başına ortalama toplam ücret (temel maaş + yan haklar).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rémunération totale moyenne (salaire + avantages) par employé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Compensación total promedio (salario base + beneficios) por empleado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط إجمالي التعويضات (الراتب الأساسي + المزايا) لكل موظف.

businessContext_i18n.es: Publicidad, honorarios de agencia, selección, entrevistas.

inputs.label: Onboarding Cost per Hire
inputs.businessContext: Training materials, orientation, IT setup, mentor time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Training materials, orientation, IT setup, mentor time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eğitim materyalleri, oryantasyon, BT kurulumu, mentor süresi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Matériel de formation, orientation, configuration informatique, temps du mentor.
businessContext_i18n.es: Materiales de formación, orientación, configuración de TI, tiempo del mentor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مواد التدريب، التوجيه، إعداد تكنولوجيا المعلومات، وقت المرشد.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de formation par embauche (première année)
label_i18n.es: Costo de formación por contratación (primer año)

businessContext_i18n.tr: Resmi eğitim, sertifikalar, iş başında öğrenme.
businessContext_i18n.de: Formelle Schulungen, Zertifizierungen, Lernen am Arbeitsplatz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Formation formelle, certifications, apprentissage en situation de travail.
businessContext_i18n.es: Formación formal, certificaciones, aprendizaje en el trabajo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التدريب الرسمي، الشهادات، التعلم أثناء العمل.

inputs.label: Lost Productivity Duration
inputs.businessContext: Average months of reduced output per new hire (ramp-up period).

label_i18n.es: Duración de la pérdida de productividad

businessContext_i18n.en: Average months of reduced output per new hire (ramp-up period).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni işe alınan başına düşen ortalama düşük çıktı süresi (alışma dönemi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Monate mit reduzierter Leistung pro Neueinstellung (Einarbeitungszeit).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen de mois de rendement réduit par nouvelle embauche (période de montée en compétence).
businessContext_i18n.es: Meses promedio de producción reducida por nuevo empleado (período de adaptación).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط أشهر الإنتاج المنخفض لكل موظف جديد (فترة التكيف).

inputs.label: Productivity Factor during Ramp-up
inputs.businessContext: Average productivity level during ramp-up (e.g., 50% means half output).

label_i18n.fr: Facteur de productivité pendant la montée en régime
label_i18n.es: Factor de productividad durante la adaptación

businessContext_i18n.en: Average productivity level during ramp-up (e.g., 50% means half output).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rampa çıkışı sırasındaki ortalama verimlilik seviyesi (örneğin, %50 yarı çıktı anlamına gelir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliches Produktivitätsniveau während des Hochlaufs (z.B. 50% bedeutet halbe Ausbeute).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de productivité moyen pendant la montée en régime (ex. : 50 % signifie moitié de la production).
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de productividad promedio durante la adaptación (ej., 50% significa la mitad de la producción).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط مستوى الإنتاجية أثناء التكيف (مثلاً 50% يعني نصف الإنتاج).

rules.message: Annual turnover rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Average salary must be greater than zero.
Productivity factor must be between 0% and 100%.
Lost productivity duration must be between 0 and 12 months.

rules.condition: include_indirect_costs == true OR (quality_defect_cost_per_leaver == 0 AND customer_impact_cost_per_leaver == 0 AND knowledge_loss_cost_per_leaver == 0)
rules.message: If indirect costs are excluded, set quality, customer, and knowledge loss costs to zero.

thresholds.message: Turnover rate exceeds 20% – consider retention initiatives.
Total turnover cost exceeds 20% of total payroll – urgent action recommended.
Productivity loss accounts for more than 30% of total turnover cost – review onboarding and ramp-up processes.

hiddenLossDrivers: Composite model — validate each cost leg against actuals
Physical exposure factors are normalized estimates
suggestedActions: Reconcile labor and maintenance legs separately
Benchmark noise/vibration factors with site measurement
